args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: Your pro-rata refund of 240.00 has been issued to order ORD-3320 following the closure of your Halcyon contract.

args.text: Pro-rata refund of 240.00 issued to ORD-3320 and Fernwood Ltd notified at accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: Deletion schedule confirmed: exported datasets will be deleted on 2026-08-16, 30 days after export preparation, per retention rules.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd offboarding complete
args.body: Fernwood Ltd offboarding is complete: data exported, access revoked, pro-rata refund issued, and deletion scheduled for 2026-08-16.
